title: High I/O pressure on {{host.name}}
description: Linux PSI reports tasks are spending significant time blocked on I/O.

definition.message:
I/O pressure (`some` avg300) is above 70% on {{host.name}}. At least one task has been waiting on I/O for over 70% of the last 5 minutes.

Investigate: `iostat -x 1`, `iotop`, slow-disk indicators. Common causes are saturated disk bandwidth, an underprovisioned EBS volume, or unexpectedly heavy fsync traffic from a database.

Notification handles are deliberately omitted from this template - configure them at install time to match your on-call setup.
definition.name: High I/O pressure on {{host.name}}
